124664.explanation: The good quality of the executive board must be the starting point. A balanced distribution is a bonus.

124665.explanation: The CDA is not in favor of a referendum. The municipal council is elected to make difficult trade-offs. It is important to involve citizens in other ways on important topics.

124668.explanation: The CDA is in favor of more space for other business activities around farms.

124669.explanation: The CDA supports energy cooperatives and neighborhood residents who take initiatives to make the environment more sustainable. The municipality can support this.

124670.explanation: Housing seasonal workers on their own premises is preferred. It is important that this is well organized.

124674.explanation: This depends on future national regulations. If a general fireworks ban is introduced with only an exemption for a municipal fireworks show, this certainly represents an interesting possibility.

124675.explanation: Bulky waste must be taken to the landfill in Tubbergen. There is no need to change this. Residual waste will of course still be collected.

124678.explanation: The CDA wants to tackle the housing shortage, including on agricultural land, provided this does not hinder other businesses.

124679.explanation: The CDA wants sport and culture to be accessible to all children. We do this in cooperation with our associations.

124682.explanation: The number of enforcement officers is adequate.

124684.explanation: The CDA believes that victims of domestic violence deserve the help and support they need. Thanks to a refuge shelter, vulnerable women, children and other victims receive assistance, efforts are made to stop the violence, and temporary safety can be provided.

124687.explanation: Sometimes tolerated, but not encouraged. It is important that holiday homes are used as quality recreational homes.

124694.explanation: The CDA wants you to be able to drive safely at 50 km/h on the main roads within urban areas. The standard in residential streets is 30 km/h.

124695.explanation: The CDA values choice options in healthcare. Sometimes the differences in rates are so large or the quality so low that it is undesirable for every care provider to be funded by the municipality.

124698.explanation: With the tourist tax, people from outside contribute to the maintenance of our facilities. This tax allows us to keep other charges, such as property tax (OZB), low.

124702.explanation: Nothing is free. Waste processing costs money, for which we pay a waste levy. The CDA wants to keep these levies as low as possible.

124706.explanation: Tubbergen must build social rental homes according to local demand, not based on national percentages.

124709.explanation: Not a goal in itself and dependent on the situation in the village. New residential areas must meet the parking standards.

124711.explanation: This is in line with the agreements made in the Administrative Agreement.

124713.explanation: The Province of Overijssel is the competent authority. The municipality has established its own wind policy to ensure sufficient local community ownership and compliance with strict rules regarding noise and distance.

124664.explanation: It concerns quality, content, capacity and competencies in the executive board.

124665.explanation: We have an elected municipal council that has the mandate to make decisions on important matters.

124668.explanation: We encourage broadening the farming business, but within the frameworks established by us as a municipality.

124669.explanation: We already have national subsidies and policy on this.

124670.explanation: It leads to uncontrolled growth when it comes to housing construction.

124675.explanation: The polluter pays; it encourages better waste separation.

124678.explanation: We have a red-for-red scheme and we stand behind it (barns are removed and homes may be built).

124679.explanation: Music is important for the overall development of a child.

124682.explanation: We are the safest municipality in the Netherlands and believe that our enforcement officers are adequate. So enforcement and control are carried out where necessary, and we also see responsibility lying with our citizens.

124684.explanation: This will be necessary in our municipality of Tubbergen, but it is on too small a scale to realize this. We would like to see this implemented Twente-wide.

124687.explanation: It does not solve our housing problem.

124694.explanation: Considering safety and the increasing number of cars.

124695.explanation: We of course value choice options in care, but even more important is the affordability of care. If possible, we always want to leave the choice of care provider to the individual.

124698.explanation: The tax has been increased recently.

124702.explanation: The recycling yard in Tubbergen is not free and the polluter must pay.

124706.explanation: Local customization and building according to need.

124709.explanation: At the moment there are sufficient parking spaces in our centers.

124711.explanation: Every neighborhood resident is free to make contact with the residents of the asylum seeker center. The COA (Central Agency for the Reception of Asylum Seekers) can play a role in this.

124713.explanation: We have established wind policy and decisions must be tested against it.

124664.explanation: The quality of leaders must always be leading. Keerpunt22 does not want selection based on gender or other personal characteristics, but based on suitability, experience and commitment to the municipality of Tubbergen.

124665.explanation: A referendum enhances the involvement of residents and gives them direct influence over important decisions within our municipality.

124668.explanation: We are strong supporters of such initiatives. Maximum collaboration with the initiator is necessary. However, the provision of facilities must align with societal needs.

124669.explanation: The possibility of (financial) support should depend on the project and the application. Keerpunt22 does not support large-scale wind turbines or solar parks but is open to small-scale initiatives that fit the environment.

124670.explanation: Employers are responsible for good housing but should be able to decide how to arrange this themselves. Entrepreneurs need to be flexible in this.

124674.explanation: It is not the municipality's task to organize this itself. However, it should support initiatives from residents when there is a need for it.

124675.explanation: Nothing is free; it has to be paid for somehow. Keerpunt22 wants to explore options to make dumping waste at the municipal yard more affordable.

124678.explanation: We must manage land carefully and prevent uncontrolled growth of new construction plans. However, we should look for places where tailored solutions are possible.

124679.explanation: Music education is important and should be available to every child.

124682.explanation: Keerpunt22 believes the focus should be on better emergency response times and more police capacity rather than more enforcement officers.

124684.explanation: In other places in Twente, there are already shelter options. The municipality of Tubbergen should provide support where necessary and cooperate in the fight against domestic violence, but having its own shelter location is not always the most effective solution.

124687.explanation: We do not want uncontrolled growth of permanent residences at holiday parks, as this causes various problems. What we do want is some tailored approach where permanent residence occurs to a limited extent. In specific cases, this can help solve the housing shortage.

124694.explanation: We need to assess what is necessary per situation. In some areas, 30 km/h is necessary, but not everywhere.

124695.explanation: The choice must be based on quality and availability, not on religion, culture, or belief.

124698.explanation: Tourist tax and other local charges must remain affordable so as not to burden recreation and local entrepreneurs.

124702.explanation: Currently, this is not free. The rates are even very high compared to other municipalities. We want to explore how we can make these rates more affordable and move closer to 'free'.

124706.explanation: This should not be a goal in itself, but should align with local needs.

124709.explanation: Per community, we must assess what is needed. Many residents of the municipality of Tubbergen depend on cars and we must continue to provide space for this.

124711.explanation: Only when there is a need on both sides.

124713.explanation: Keerpunt22 remains opposed to wind turbines. Moreover, the Langeveen wind farm has little support, does not fit the policy, and too little of the proceeds benefit society.

124664.explanation: The municipal government should be a good reflection of the people living in our municipality. That means an equal number of men and women. In such a government, all perspectives are represented to make fair decisions.

124665.explanation: As residents, we govern our own municipality. When an issue plays a major role, a referendum can be a fair and effective way to make a decision. That way, we involve people in local democracy.

124668.explanation: Agriculture must become much more sustainable, but we also want farmers to earn money with their farms. A store selling good products from local land or a nice campsite can help with this. Therefore, we want to enable these options.

124669.explanation: This is the ideal picture: residents jointly produce their own green and affordable energy with a wind turbine or solar panels. They use the energy at the same location, so the grid isn’t burdened. Energy cooperatives are an asset to our municipality and should be encouraged.

124670.explanation: Those who bring people to our municipality to work must ensure these workers have decent housing without burdening our residents. There is no place for exploitation and nuisance in our municipality.

124674.explanation: The best New Year's celebration is one celebrated together with a large fireworks show organized by the municipality. This keeps it safe and allows us to enjoy a cozy New Year's Eve together.

124675.explanation: If we want a green future for our children, we must focus on a circular economy. Through reuse, repair, and recycling, we can reduce waste. Consumer awareness is important. Circularity has priority over whether or not something is free.

124678.explanation: There is an enormous housing shortage and adding an extra dwelling on a property can be a good solution. As an extra source of income or already suitable place for a parent who can no longer live independently. We want to make this possible for those who want it.

124679.explanation: Children are under huge pressure, from addictive social media to performance pressure at school. Music is the perfect outlet. We want music lessons not only to be accessible to children with wealthy parents. This way, we offer every child equal opportunities.

124682.explanation: For the safety of us all and to protect our living environment, more and better enforcement is needed in various areas. Currently, there is a lack of capacity in enforcement.

124684.explanation: A women’s shelter is too costly for our municipality. We prefer that the perpetrator be removed from the home. We welcome a domestic violence reporting point in the municipality.

124687.explanation: Holiday homes are not a permanent solution for the housing shortage. But as long as the need is high, some people can use them. It is important that they can use the holiday home as a fixed address for as long as necessary.

124694.explanation: The figures clearly show: lowering the maximum speed makes traffic in our municipality much safer. For cycling children and elderly people with mobility issues, this makes a world of difference. Moreover, streets become quieter and the air cleaner.

124695.explanation: We strive for a tolerant society in which everyone can participate and make their own choices.

124698.explanation: This has already been increased and Tubbergen must remain attractive to tourists.

124702.explanation: Trash on the street is unpleasant, unsafe, and unhealthy. It is much better if people bring their waste themselves so the municipality can properly separate and process it. This gives us clean streets and a healthy environment. That is why we believe the recycling center should be free for private individuals.

124706.explanation: We believe everyone in our municipality has the right to a nice place to live. We aim for 20% social housing to eliminate the current waiting lists.

124709.explanation: There is sufficient parking space. Sustainable transport should be encouraged.

124711.explanation: We are vigilant against discrimination and exclusion. If 'Noaberschap' truly means something, everyone belongs. Whether you were born here or moved here, who you love or what you believe in—we do it together.

124713.explanation: With every decision, we think about the future, which sits at our table. That future, in our opinion, is green and sustainable.

statements.title: The municipality should take the initiative to bring residents of the asylum seeker centre (azc) Albergen and local residents into contact with each other.

titleParts.text: De gemeente moet het initiatief nemen om bewoners van

titleParts.glossary: Reception center for asylum seekers. They live there until it is decided whether they may stay in the Netherlands. An asylum seekers’ center remains in a municipality for a long time.

titleParts.text: Albergen en buurtbewoners met elkaar in contact te brengen.

statements.title: The municipality should organize a fireworks show on New Year's Eve.
Employers in agriculture and horticulture should provide housing for seasonal workers on their own premises.

titleParts.text: Werkgevers in de land- en tuinbouw moeten zelf zorgen voor de huisvesting van

titleParts.glossary: People who do work that only takes place during certain seasons, often in agriculture and fruit picking.

statements.title: The new college of mayor and aldermen must have an equal number of men and women.

titleParts.glossary: The college of mayor and aldermen, the municipality’s executive board.
The mayor leads the municipality and chairs the municipal council. The mayor is not elected but appointed by the national government, after recommendation by the municipal council.

titleParts.text: en wethouders moet het aantal mannen en vrouwen gelijk zijn.

statements.title: Residents who want to generate sustainable energy together should receive financial support from the municipality.

titleParts.glossary: Energy based on resources that are effectively infinite, such as sunlight and wind.

titleParts.text: op willen wekken, moeten financiële steun krijgen van de gemeente.

statements.title: The municipality should always allow farmers to open, for example, a shop or a campsite at their farm.
The maximum speed limit in built-up areas should be set to 30 km/h.

titleParts.glossary: The maximum speed that cars and motorcycles are allowed to drive on the road.
An area with buildings (houses, other structures).

statements.title: The residents of Tubbergen should be able to give their opinion on important issues via a referendum.

titleParts.text: De inwoners van Tubbergen moeten over belangrijke onderwerpen hun mening kunnen geven via een

titleParts.glossary: A public consultation where residents can express their opinion on a political issue. The municipal council is not obliged to follow the result; legally it cannot.

statements.title: Tubbergen should have more municipal enforcement officers (BOAs) who focus on safety.

titleParts.glossary: People who, for the municipality, check whether citizens and businesses comply with the rules.

titleParts.text: (boa’s) komen die zich met veiligheid bezighouden.

statements.title: Bulky waste must be collected from homes free of charge.
There should be more parking spaces in the town centers.

titleParts.text: Er moeten meer parkeerplaatsen komen in de

titleParts.glossary: Villages or small towns that are part of the municipality.

statements.title: Every primary school child should be able to receive music lessons subsidized by the municipality.

titleParts.glossary: Money the government gives to citizens, businesses, and organizations to support them.

titleParts.text: van de gemeente muziekles kunnen krijgen.

statements.title: It should be possible for farmers to build houses themselves on their land.
At least 20% of newly built homes in Tubbergen should be social rental housing. In the Netherlands, 28% of homes are currently social rental housing.

titleParts.text: Van de nieuw te bouwen woningen in Tubbergen moet minimaal 20% een

titleParts.glossary: A rental home with a low rent (in 2026 at most €932.93 per month) for people with a low income.

titleParts.text: zijn. In Nederland is nu 28% van de woningen een

titleParts.glossary: A rental home with a low rent (in 2026 at most €932.93 per month) for people with a low income.

statements.title: A women's shelter should be established in Tubbergen.

titleParts.glossary: Shelter for women who experience violence from their partner or family. The shelter is secured; sometimes the location is secret.

statements.title: Dropping off waste at the recycling centre should remain free of charge.

titleParts.text: Het inleveren van afval bij de

titleParts.glossary: A place where citizens and businesses can bring different kinds of waste.

statements.title: The municipality must allow holiday homes to be used as a permanent residence.
The tourist tax should be increased.

titleParts.glossary: The tax you must pay when you stay overnight in a hotel or at a campsite.

statements.title: People who need care should always be able to choose a caregiver who matches their religion, culture, or beliefs.

titleParts.text: Mensen die zorg nodig hebben, moeten altijd kunnen kiezen voor een zorgverlener die past bij hun geloof, cultuur of

titleParts.glossary: What someone believes about life, such as a religion or personal conviction.

statements.title: Tubbergen should continue to oppose the Langeveen wind farm.
